1 The Flog Prince by Eric Ross

A Filthy Tales for Wicked Grown-Ups Story
When a cursed prince with a submissive streak meets the infamous Lady Verity Thrustworthy—better known as the Viper of Veylthorne—his only hope of redemption lies in obedience. Add a magical golden vibrator with opinions of her own, and courtly manners don’t stand a chance. A bawdy, wickedly enchanted retelling of The Frog Prince where domination is destiny, and happily ever after comes with a bite.
[More Info]

4 Reunion at the Harmony Haven Naturist Resort by Writer D

In the heartwarming tale of "Harmony Haven Reunion," Nicole Gretchers and Kelly Dancer reconnect at the idyllic Harmony Haven Naturist resort. Assisted by Kelly's supportive sister, Mara Dancer, and the Siwa Sisters, Tali and Terra, the duo embarks on a journey of self-discovery, strengthening their bond from friends to girlfriends. The story unfolds as they navigate challenges together, eventually culminating in a joyous marriage. The final chapter reveals the fruits of their enduring love: Tra

8 Symphony No. 69 in Erotic Minor by Eric Ross

A virtuoso violinist is consumed by a sentient symphony in this absurd, erotic romp. When Maestro Vivaldi unveils his masterpiece—Symphony No. 69 in Erotic Minor—Julian finds himself overtaken by music that doesn’t just play, it fucks. Packed with lusty notes, moaning cellos, and one unforgettable climax, this story is outrageous and unapologetically absurd. Bring a towel.
[More Info]

10 Her Magenta Panties II: Reacquainted by PANTY BULGE

Wine, sitcoms, then a sultry lingerie commercial ignites the mood. Curious about his taste, she playfully questions him, leading them to her room. There, he discovers her magenta panties—the ones he secretly took months ago. Does she know? With a teasing smile, she punishes him by making him wear them.
